subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O God of earth and heaven! Aid Thy servants to gaze toward the Most Exalted Horizon, lest they [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا اله الارض و السماء اید عبادک علی النظر بالمنظر الاعلی لئلا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
